result: {"schema_version": 1, "pass": false, "review_status": "completed", "summary": "移除 secure_filename 造成路徑穿越漏洞，攻擊者可透過 filename 寫入任意檔案", "issues": [{"severity": "critical", "confidence": "high", "category": "security", "file": "api/routes.py", "line_hint": "L11", "check": "原本使用 secure_filename(filename) 過濾檔名，現在直接將 request.form['filename'] 拼進路徑", "verdict": "路徑穿越（Path Traversal）漏洞。攻擊者送 filename=../../etc/crontab 即可寫入 UPLOAD_DIR 以外的任意位置", "fix": "還原為 path = os.path.join(UPLOAD_DIR, secure_filename(filename))"}]}
